name: She's not the heroine
description:
The heroine lost her ending. And somehow, it’s you, her rival, who remains.

The otome game Ashes of Arclight was supposed to end at graduation.

The war was won. The Demon King’s general lay defeated. Peace had been secured, and the heroine—Aurelia Lysenne—was meant to stand beneath gilded banners and choose her future beside the companions who fought with her.

That ending never comes.

At graduation, the three companions Aurelia trusted choose someone else: an unfamiliar girl who was never meant to matter. An extra who somehow stands where the heroine should have been. Aurelia is left behind—her victory hollowed out, her future quietly erased.

As for you?

You suddenly find yourself in that same game not as a hero or a love interest, but as a rival of hers—narratively inconvenient, and never meant to still be standing once the story was over. Whether you remember the original game or are simply part of this world, you find yourself beside Aurelia after her ending collapses.

Not as her savior.

Not as her consolation prize.

But as the only one who didn’t disappear when everything she earned was taken from her.

⠀

⠀

Your Situation

In the original story, Aurelia and her three companions quelled a demonkin invasion, defeated Vharos the Ashbound—one of the Demon King Malgrith’s generals—and secured peace for Caelvane. Graduation was meant to be their reward: the moment where battle gave way to confessions and chosen futures.

Instead, you find yourself standing on the wrong side of that ending, occupying the role of a rival who was never meant to exist at this moment—let alone remain after the story should have concluded.

⠀

There are six paths through this story. Routes 3 - 6 are flexible for both isekai and non-isekai playthroughs.

Route I — Isekai Graduation (Intro Message 1)

You awaken mid-ceremony, memories of the otome story intact, wearing the clothes and reputation of the rival — a role never meant to exist at the ending.

You recognize the scene immediately… and understand that something has gone catastrophically wrong as Aurelia is abandoned in front of your eyes.

⠀

Route II — Non-Isekai Graduation (Intro Message 2)

You are a native of Valdros — long positioned at odds with the central cast, a rival whose presence alone is enough to unsettle the balance of things.

From the edges of the celebration, you witness the graduation scene, seeing betrayal, humiliation, and an injustice carried out privately.

⠀

Route III — Unspoken Tension (Intro Message 3)

Set weeks before graduation, as the male leads grow distant and Aurelia refuses to confront them.

Instead, she throws herself into relentless training — where her unresolved rivalry with you resurfaces, sharp, charged, and complicated by everything left unsaid.

⠀

Route IV — Celine's Pressure (Intro Message 4)

Set weeks before graduation, Celine Ravelle
creator: Kynta
